view.title: Validate explicit UC need #4
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for strong ownership checks is satisfied as evidenced by the successful validation of user-specific source sharing.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 4 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for strong ownership checks is satisfied as evidenced by the successful validation of user-specific source sharing.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement of strong ownership checks by confirming that users can only share their own sources. The evidence from prior steps shows that the user (biz_owner) has granted access to specific calendar sources, which are tied to their ownership. This is further supported by the scenario described in the linked use case, where the user shares different source sets with different businesses, ensuring that only their own sources are shared.
